description_long: This is a pair of modern recreational boats, each featuring a streamlined hull and a spacious deck area. The boats are equipped with prominent blue slides at the stern, suggesting a design for leisure and water activities. The superstructure includes a covered cockpit with windows, railings along the perimeter, and multiple access points, including ladders at the rear. The hulls are sleek and angular, with black and gray color schemes accented by blue slides. The boats appear to be constructed primarily from metal and fiberglass, with some plastic and rubber components for the slides and railings. The overall design is robust, with ample space for passengers and activities on board.
description: A pair of sleek, modern recreational boats with blue slides at the stern, covered cockpits, and spacious decks, primarily in gray and black with blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bow, covered cockpit, and open deck layout with railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the boats, the blue slides at the stern, and the streamlined hull design.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the blue slides, ladders, and access points at the stern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hull contours, slide placement, and superstructure details.
